data.name: Carnal After Dark™
data.detailed_description:
Choose your toys.  Choose your characters.  Choose your fantasy.  Carnal After Dark brings an intimate VR experience to your fingertips.  Explore your fetishes and kinks in multiple sandbox environments to find what stimulates you the most.  What will you choose?

When the lights are dimmed, what do you fantasize about?  Carnal After Dark is your personal VR sandbox experience to bring those erotic thoughts to life.

Choose Your Partner(s)

Explore our cast and choose whomever tickles your fancy.  Keep it intimate and personal, or maybe see if three really is a crowd...

Choose Your Toys

Select from a wide range of scintillating silicone and other toys to fit your needs.

Find Your Fetish

You've set the scene, now see for yourself how best to make us climax.  Bring them to their knees, begging for more of your dominating discipline. Or feel the shivers of submission as you please your skilled lover in everyway imaginable. Do you have what it takes to last all night long?

data.short_description: Carnal After Dark™ is an immersive VR experience that puts your fantasies in a whole new light. Explore deeply erotic interactions with characters that ache for your touch. Indulge in the creative atmosphere settings, titillating toys, and pleasurable partners, let your lust run free.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-7700 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600 (or 8th Gen Intel / equivalent AMD)
  • 記憶體: 16 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1660 / AMD RX 580 8GB / NVIDIA RTX 2060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR, Meta Quest 2/3 (via Air Link or USB-C), Valve Index
  • 備註: A VR headset is required. On minimum specs, players should use lowered graphical settings, reduced resolution scale, and enabled performance options for stable framerates. Extensive in-game graphics and fluidity settings allow further optimization.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-10700K / AMD Ryzen 7 5700X or better
  • 記憶體: 32 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA RTX 3060 12GB / AMD RX 6700 XT
  • VR 支援: SteamVR, Meta Quest 2/3 (via Air Link or USB-C), Valve Index
  • 備註: SSD recommended for faster loading and reduced hitching in large or streamed scenes. 32 GB RAM significantly improves performance with high-fidelity settings and asset streaming. For the best experience, use a 90 Hz+ headset and the latest GPU drivers. In-game settings allow fine-tuning for your preferred balance of visuals and performance.
